description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with variable IMAGE_NAME set to tessia-baselib:${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG} and stages build, lint, unittest, cleanup. In the build stage add a build job that runs git bundle create tools/ci/docker/assets/tessia-baselib.git HEAD, then docker build --pull --force-rm -f tools/ci/docker/Dockerfile -t $IMAGE_NAME tools/ci/docker, and finally docker run --env TESSIA_BASELIB_INTERACTIVE=no --rm $IMAGE_NAME. In the lint stage add a lint job that runs docker run -t --rm --entrypoint /assets/tessia-baselib/tools/run_pylint.py $IMAGE_NAME. In the unittest stage add a unittest job that runs docker run -t --rm --entrypoint /assets/tessia-baselib/tools/run_tests.py $IMAGE_NAME and captures coverage matching /^TOTAL.*\s+(\d+\%)$/. In the cleanup stage add a cleanup job that always runs, executing docker rm -v $(docker ps -a -q -f "ancestor=${IMAGE_NAME}") || true, docker rmi $(docker images -a -q -f "dangling=true") || true, and docker rmi --no-prune $IMAGE_NAME.
